descpText: PocketList is a simple application designed to help you organize your shopping lists so you won’t forget anything when you go out. You can use it for anything you like — supermarket trips, hardware store visits, home shopping, Valentine’s Day lists, Christmas gifts, Mom and Dad’s presents — whatever you choose, PocketList is for you.
noList: No lists have been created yet. Press
noItems: No items have been added yet. Press
deletePar: This action will delete all your lists.
deleteDialo: This action will permanently erase all information from your lists.
deleteListDia: Are you sure you want to delete this list?
studio: By Plus Brand Studio. Click to visit their website.
aImgs2: All images used in this application are from undraw.co. Click to visit their website.
new1: Added a button to view list details
new2: Added a button to edit lists
new3: Added a contact screen where you can send an email to the author
new4: Added a message when all list items are completed
new5: Added the ability to export/import shopping lists to share with other users of the app
fix1: Fixed item order when exporting PDF
aboutDonation: Donations are optional, but they help me continue creating content and writing code.
authorDonation: Would you buy me a coffee?
authorDonation2: A cup of coffee helps me keep writing code.
listComplete: List completed. Do you want to keep it?
msgImporExporlist: You don’t have any lists yet
resetListConfirm: Do you want to uncheck all completed items?
